jd.raw_text: Careers Why join us now Life at Headout Work with us Help the world headout. Join us to reshape how people experience the world—crafting moments that inspire and memories that last a lifetime. See open roles Why join us now? Headout today offers you the best of three worlds simultaneously: a) the scale and growth of a post product-market fit startup in high velocity mode, b) the window to join early enough where the team is small and nimble and c) the opportunity to build a global product that makes a real difference to people from every part of the world. GROWTH IS GOOD Grown 8x to $200M+ revenue After establishing our post-Covid baseline, we've grown 8x (and going strong) to $200M in revenue (not GBV) with new geographies, new categories of experiences and a new wave of audiences who love us more and more. GUESTS SERVED 0 million+ We’ve served 49M+ guests! What’s even more exciting? 25 million of those happened in just the last 4 years. And we’re only getting started! COUNTRIES SERVED 110+ countries From Chile to China and from Mauritania to Micronesia (and everything in between), people are choosing to head out with Headout. CAPITAL RAISED $0 million We take pride in having raised substantial capital to accelerate our growth, but we're even more proud to have achieved PAT profitability—marking a pivotal milestone on our path to becoming a self-sustaining growth engine. LIFE AT HEADOUT Operating principles Our workplace mission is simple: enable people to do their life's best work. We do this by ensuring you have challenging work you love alongside an environment that supports you in it. We think workplace happiness is simply a by-product of this. We've crafted a team and culture that executes relentlessly every single day for our customers and partners. A team guided by our playbook — reflecting partly who we are and part who we want to be. It's not perfect but we like being candid about things that aren't. Ownership is the job description We pick up the trash instead of leaving it on the floor or talking about it. Craft in all we do How we do something matters just as much as what we do. We refuse to settle for 'good enough' when 'great' is within reach. If AI can, AI should AI isn’t a side experiment. We actively build it into how we think, how we operate, and how we scale. Optimism is more fun We approach problems with possibility, stay grounded in reality, and believe the world we’re building isn’t zero-sum. Headout > I Every decision we make is in service of our mission to help people experience the world. Urgent by design, focused by default We move fast because the world moves fast, but we stay focused about what matters most. Headout > I Every decision we make is in service of our mission to help people experience the world. Urgent by design, focused by default We move fast because the world moves fast, but we stay focused about what matters most. BACKED BY THE BEST A team creating tremendous value Headout is built for the world from India. Our 9 offices across the globe, a team made of 20 nationalities, and a global business footprint, gives you an unparalleled world view to learn and build a fast-growing startup without geo constraints. Startup spotlight Featured as America's Best Startup Employers (2025). GPTW certified We’re Great Place to Work® certified in India, Germany, and the UK — a reflection of what we’re building together, across teams. Top 25% Our Employee Net Promoter Score ranks in the top quartile of organisations of our size. Perks We are firm believers that the reasons why someone should join Headout is because they believe in our mission and culture, want to work with our people, love our product and lastly, want to enjoy the perks we offer. Our perks are the icing on the cake - not the cake itself 🙂 ESOPs Everyone at Headout is awarded ESOPs because ownership isn’t just a principle we believe in, it’s one we practice. Mental wellness check Get access to unlimited 1-on-1 therapy sessions, newsletters, and seminars with our mental health partners. Headout credits $500 worth of Headout Credits to, you guessed it, head out to any of our experiences around the world. Flexible time-off It's your life, and your time. Our flexible leave policy is designed to help you find the balance you need to be your absolute best at work. Health insurance Nothing matters more than your health and well-being. Everything else comes later. Learning credits We give you learning credits so you can level up in ways that matter to you, even if it’s outside your job description. WORK WITH US How we hire Every great journey starts with a first step. Here’s what happens after you take yours with us. See how we hire → Application review Our team will review your application and guide you through the next steps. Given the high volume of applications we receive, we encourage you to prioritize brevity and clarity over the length of your resume. Problem solving We’ll walk you through a set of problems that will get you thinking. Depending on the role, you may either need to block off some time or take a few days to complete and submit your work. Discussions We’ll have a series of discussions, each with a specific purpose. These conversations help us get to know each other better, both as professionals and as potential future colleagues. References We’ll reach out to a few of your past colleagues to learn about you from their perspective. We will then evaluate your overall candidacy and extend an offer as the last step.
